PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 23, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 20, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. JUDGE: MARLA J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is off calendar. Moving party did not give opposing party sufficient notice under Code of Civil Procedure Section 1005(b). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal is continued to April 23, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 20, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
